sentence: I need to tie my shoelaces before we go outside.
She bought a paperback at the bookstore.
He got a haircut before the wedding.
A jellyfish floated past us in the ocean.
We saw colorful fish underwater.
Divers explored the old shipwreck.
The sunshine warmed our faces at the beach.
She broke a fingernail opening the box.
We had cornbread with our chili.
The car was stuck in a deep snowdrift.
I left my backpack in the hallway.
He hurt his kneecap when he fell.
We had pancakes for breakfast.
We saw two rainbows after the storm.
The lake was a beautiful blue-green color.
It takes self-control to wait your turn.
The audience was spellbound by the magician.
We joined the countdown on New Year's Eve.
I had half a grapefruit for breakfast.
There are forty-six students in our class.
The railway runs through the valley.
We watched the live broadcast of the game.
